contract.label: Contract
contract.description: Ticker symbol of the perpetual futures contract as listed on the venue.

baseAsset.label: Base Asset
baseAsset.description: Underlying real-world asset the perpetual contract tracks.

venue.label: Venue
venue.description: Protocol or exchange where the perpetual contract is listed and traded.

category.label: Category
category.description: High-level economic category assigned to the perpetual contract.

assetGroup.label: Asset Group
assetGroup.description: Grouping of the base asset by issuer or product family.

assetClass.label: Asset Class
assetClass.description: High-level economic category of the underlying asset, such as commodities, equities, or fixed income.

openInterest.label: Open Interest
openInterest.description: Total USD value of outstanding perpetual contracts that have not been settled or closed.

volume24h.label: 24h Volume
volume24h.description: Total USD notional volume traded on this contract in the last 24 hours.

price.label: Price
price.description: Latest traded price of the perpetual contract in USD.

priceChange24h.label: 24h Price Change
priceChange24h.description: Percentage change in contract price over the last 24 hours.

fundingRate.label: Latest Funding Rate
fundingRate.description: Most recent periodic funding rate paid between long and short position holders. Positive means longs pay shorts.

premium.label: Premium
premium.description: Percentage difference between the perpetual contract price and the underlying asset's spot or index price.

maxLeverage.label: Max Leverage
maxLeverage.description: Maximum leverage multiplier available for this contract on the venue.

parentPlatform.label: Parent Platform
parentPlatform.description: Parent protocol or chain infrastructure on which the venue is built.

marginAsset.label: Margin Asset
marginAsset.description: Asset required as collateral to open or maintain a position on this contract.

settlementAsset.label: Settlement Asset
settlementAsset.description: Asset in which profits and losses on the contract are settled.

issuer.label: Issuer
issuer.description: Entity responsible for issuing or managing the underlying real-world asset.

oracleProvider.label: Oracle Provider
oracleProvider.description: Data provider supplying the reference price feed used by the contract.

rwaClassification.label: RWA Classification
rwaClassification.description: Classification indicating how closely the contract relates to a tokenized real-world asset.

accessModel.label: Access Model
accessModel.description: Indicates whether trading the contract requires KYC, permissioning, or is permissionlessly accessible.

makerFeeRate.label: Maker Fee
makerFeeRate.description: Fee rate charged on maker (limit) orders for this contract.

takerFeeRate.label: Taker Fee
takerFeeRate.description: Fee rate charged on taker (market) orders for this contract.

deployerFeeShare.label: Deployer Fee Share
deployerFeeShare.description: Share of trading fees allocated to the contract deployer.

cumulativeFunding.label: Cum. Funding / Unit
cumulativeFunding.description: Total cumulative funding payments per unit since the contract's inception.

oraclePx.label: Oracle Px
oraclePx.description: Current price reported by the oracle price feed.

midPx.label: Mid Px
midPx.description: Midpoint between the best bid and best ask price on the order book.

prevDayPx.label: Prev Day Px
prevDayPx.description: Closing or settlement price from the previous trading day.

volume7d.label: Volume 7d
volume7d.description: Total USD notional volume traded on this contract over the last 7 days.

volume30d.label: Volume 30d
volume30d.description: Total USD notional volume traded on this contract over the last 30 days.

volumeAllTime.label: Volume All Time
volumeAllTime.description: Total USD notional volume traded on this contract since inception.

estimatedProtocolFees24h.label: Est. Protocol Fees 24h
estimatedProtocolFees24h.description: Estimated fees earned by the protocol from trading activity on this contract in the last 24 hours.

estimatedProtocolFees7d.label: Est. Protocol Fees 7d
estimatedProtocolFees7d.description: Estimated fees earned by the protocol from trading activity on this contract in the last 7 days.

estimatedProtocolFees30d.label: Est. Protocol Fees 30d
estimatedProtocolFees30d.description: Estimated fees earned by the protocol from trading activity on this contract in the last 30 days.

estimatedProtocolFeesAllTime.label: Est. Protocol Fees All Time
estimatedProtocolFeesAllTime.description: Estimated total fees earned by the protocol from trading activity on this contract since inception.

totalOpenInterest.label: Total Open Interest
totalOpenInterest.description: Aggregate USD value of all outstanding perpetual contracts across all tracked markets.

totalVolume24h.label: Total 24h Volume
totalVolume24h.description: Aggregate USD notional volume traded across all tracked markets in the last 24 hours.

totalMarkets.label: Total Markets
totalMarkets.description: Total number of perpetual contract markets tracked.

markets.label: Markets
markets.description: Number of perpetual contract markets listed on this venue.

openInterestShare.label: % of Total OI
openInterestShare.description: This venue's share of total open interest across all tracked venues.

volume24hShare.label: % of Total 24h Volume
volume24hShare.description: This venue's share of total 24-hour trading volume across all tracked venues.

sizeDecimals.label: Size Decimals
sizeDecimals.description: Number of decimal places used for position sizing on this contract.

oraclePrice.label: Oracle Price
oraclePrice.description: Current price reported by the oracle price feed.

midPrice.label: Mid Price
midPrice.description: Midpoint between the best bid and best ask price.

previousDayPrice.label: Previous Day Price
previousDayPrice.description: Closing or settlement price from the previous trading day.

pair.label: Pair
pair.description: Trading pair identifier for the contract.

cumulativeVolume.label: Cumulative Volume
cumulativeVolume.description: Total USD notional volume traded on this contract since inception.

estimatedCumulativeProtocolFees.label: Est. Cum. Protocol Fees
estimatedCumulativeProtocolFees.description: Estimated total fees earned by the protocol from this contract since inception.

tradingParameters.label: Trading Parameters
tradingParameters.description: Key trading configuration parameters for this contract.

marketReference.label: Market Reference
marketReference.description: Reference pricing data points for this contract.

website.label: Website
website.description: Official website for the venue or contract.

snapshotTime.label: Snapshot Time
snapshotTime.description: Timestamp of the most recent data snapshot for this contract.
